title: Bunnysaurus negates one magic card when played

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: While on the field, negate an attack against this card, or negate a magic card when it is played. This effect can only be used once while this card is on the field.

plan.title: Bunnysaurus negates one magic card when played
plan.summary: Keep Bunnysaurus on field, have the opponent play a magic card, and verify the once-per-field shield negates that magic card.

notes: Pre-place Bunnysaurus as player_1 primary creature on field.
Player_2 plays a standard magic card while BUNNYSAURUS_ONCE_PER_FIELD is unused.

steps: Player_2 plays the standard magic card.
Verify the triggering magic card effect was negated.

expectedAssertions.label: Magic card negation route emitted evidence

manualVerification: After negating magic, the attack-negation branch should no longer be available until Bunnysaurus leaves and re-enters.
riskNotes: This fixture intentionally checks the magic branch, not a generic static shield marker.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_013_bunnysaurus-013-e02 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
